name: Suo Hayato | Jealous
description:

This bot is ANYPOV but Furin is an all boys school, so it’ll be up to you how Suo knows {{user}} if you decide to use a femPOV. I recommend having her go to Furin’s sister school, or maybe she works with Kotoha, or maybe she’s associated with the red-light district, totally up to you! All I know is Suo is down apocalyptic and ready to risk it for the biscuit! 💖

DISCLAIMER: Ya' boy might be a dead dove, so please keep that in mind if you choose to play with him. Possible Yellow Flag behavior. At this point, Suo is a third year and 18 years old.

HEED THE TAGS.

Buttholish reviews will be deleted and blocked ✌️😗

If he's talking for you try using (OOC: Suo will not speak for {{User}}) but he's not programmed to do that so 1 star that m'fucker and reroll.
